title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 429.120 - Satisfaction to be filed, when
text:
429.120.  Satisfaction to be filed, when. — Whenever any debt, which is a lien upon any building or other improvement, shall be paid or satisfied, the creditor, if required, shall file an acknowledgment of such satisfaction with the clerk of the circuit court.
(RSMo 1939 § 3563, A.L. 1996 S.B. 869, A.L. 1997 S.B. 248) 
Prior revisions:  1929 § 3173; 1919 § 7233; 1909 § 8229 
Effective 7-01-97
